name: vscode
description: VS Code IDE integration — in-editor chat, MCP bridge, ticket sidebar, and selection-to-task dispatch to the Zero-Employee Orchestrator daemon.

capabilities.chat_panel: Inline chat panel bound to the local ZEO daemon.
capabilities.mcp_bridge: Uses the built-in MCP stdio transport (`zero-employee mcp serve`).
capabilities.ticket_sidebar: Lists in-progress ZEO tickets and approvals, refresh every 30s.
capabilities.selection_dispatch: Right-click → 'Send to ZEO as ticket' — wraps the editor selection with wrap_external_data on the backend.
capabilities.inline_suggestions: Uses the local LLM gateway for quick-pick code transforms; no editor text ever leaves the operator's machine unless an external provider is explicitly configured.

integration.approval_gate: Every 'execute_skill_from_editor' call surfaces the approval dialog in VS Code's notification area.
integration.kill_switch: ZEO's global kill switch disables all extension commands immediately.
integration.operator_profile: Respects the operator's language + autonomy level when suggesting inline completions.

distribution.build: cd extensions/vscode && pnpm install && pnpm run package

author: Zero-Employee Orchestrator Team
